source_formulae: P0R02504: I. The Unified Phase Dynamics Equation (UPDE) - The Spine of the SCPN

P0R02505: The framework's spine (Core Assumption 4) is the Unified Phase Dynamics Equation (UPDE), a generalised, multi-scale extension of the Kuramoto model describing phase evolution across all layers.
P0R02506: The phase (thetaiL) of the i-th oscillator at Layer L evolves according to:
P0R02507: $dtd\theta iL = \omega iL + \sum_{}^{}{j KijL sin(\theta jL - \theta iL)} + CInterLayer + CField + \eta iL(t)$
P0R02509: Inter-Layer Coupling (CInterLayer): Manages hierarchical nesting and timescale separation.
P0R02510: $CInterLayer = \epsilon L - 1 FD\left( \left\langle \theta L - 1 \right\rangle,\theta iL \right) + \epsilon L + 1 GU\left( \theta iL,\left\langle \theta L + 1 \right\rangle \right)$
P0R02511: Field Coupling (CField): Direct influence of the global Consciousness Field (Psi).
